description.content:
API for managing users, groups, and permissions within the Seismic platform. Provides capabilities to create and manage user accounts, organize users into groups and teams, assign roles and permissions, and manage team structures for content access control.

Contact Support:
 Name: Seismic Support
 Email: support@seismic.com
